Package component.modifier.changer

Class Setter<T>

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.changer.Changer<T>
component.modifier.changer.Setter<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of property being set (e.g., Suit, Material, or Integer).
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
Direct Known Subclasses:
MaterialSetter, SuitSetter, ValueSetter
public abstract class Setter<T> extends Changer<T>
The Setter class is an abstract base for all modifiers that set a card property to a specific value.

This class serves as a grouping for setters that can be resolved together for rendering and logical classification.
